ipxact:register.ipxact:name: CLKDIV
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: System Clock Divider Register

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: sys_clk_div
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicates the clock pulse width of the generated SCL in terms of number of system clock (clk_i) cycles

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: MSTCFG0
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Controller Configuration 0 Register

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: auto_assert_role
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only when Secondary Controller is enabled. 1 - Enable auto assert role. Automatically assert role when taking over as the new Active Controller after GETACCCR CCC. The device will send the broadcast address {0x7E, W} to assert its role. 0 - Disable auto assert role. Device will wait until other device pull the SDA down or if user writes to Tx FIFO.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_auto_resp
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only when Secondary Controller is enabled. 1 - Always NAK the IBI request and continue the current transfer until Tx FIFO is empty. 0 - Pause the SCL on low during ACK phase and wait for the user to program the appropriate response. See registers ibi_rcnt and ibi_resp.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ignore_cmd_done
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 1 - The I3C controller will continue to process the contents of the Tx FIFO until it is empty. 0 - The I3C controller will stop after transferring 1 packet and the user will have to set/program the start register again to resume the transfer.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: i2c_mode_allowed
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 1 - Allows transferring I2C frames. 0 - Only I3C frames can be transferred.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ignore_rcvd_nak
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 1 - The IP will continue to process the contents of the Tx FIFO (until empty) even if a NAK was received. 0 - The I3C controller will stop after receiving a NAK and the user will have to set/program the start register again to resume the transfer.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: en_daa_uid_in_rxfifo
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: During dynamic address assignment, the I3C targets will broadcast their unique IDs (48bits) including BCR and DCR as part of the arbitration process. 1 - The unique IDs, BCR, and DCR will be stored in Rx FIFO and can be read by user. 0 - It will be discarded.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: i3c_priv_rw_no_7e
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 1 - Starts the private write/read access with dynamic address instead of I3C broadcast address 0x7E. 0 - The private access will start with 0x7E address followed by repeated start (Sr) then the target's dynamic address.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: ODTIMER
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Open-Drain Timer.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: od_timer
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Used for generation of SCL clock in open drain mode of I3C transaction. This setting indicates the clock pulse width of open drain SCL clock in terms of number of normal SCL clock cycles as generated using sys_clk_div setting. (0 - 1 SCL clock cycle. Use normal SCL clock generated using the System Clock divider., 1 - 2 SCL clock cycles, ..., 15 - 16 SCL clock cycles)

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: I2C_DIV
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: I2C Clock Divider Register. Applicable only when user enabled the use of internal dividers in IP Generation GUI.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: i2c_clkdiv
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Used for generation of SCL clock in I2C mode. This setting indicates the clock pulse width of SCL in terms of number of system clock (clk_i) cycles. (0 - 1 clk_i clock cycle, 1 - 2 clk_i clock cycles, ..., 255 - 256 clk_i clock cycles)

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: SPUWPU
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Pull Up Resistor Disable Register

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: scl_spu_n
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, disables the strong pull up resistor in SCL.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: scl_wpu_n
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, disables the weak pull up resistor in SCL.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: sda_spu_n
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, disables the strong pull up resistor in SDA.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: sda_wpu_n
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, disables the weak pull up resistor in SDA.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: HDRCFG0
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: HDR-DDR Mode Configuration. Applicable only when user enabled the HDR-DDR capability.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: no_crc_after_term
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only when HDR-DDR capability is enabled. Configures the data transfer ending procedure. 1 - No CRC word follows early termination request. 0 - CRC word follows early termination request.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: en_wr_early_term
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only when HDR-DDR capability is enabled. Configures the data transfer ending procedure. 1 - Enables write early termination request. 0 - Disables write early termination request.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: en_wrcmd_acknak_cap
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only when HDR-DDR capability is enabled. Configures the data transfer ending procedure. 1 - Enables ACK/NAK capability for write command. 0 - Disables ACK/NAK capability for write command.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: SOFTRST
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Soft Reset.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ip_csr_rst
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, resets the IP registers only. Auto-clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ip_core_rst
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, resets the I3C Controller only. Auto-clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: tx_fifo_rst
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, resets the Tx FIFO only. Auto-clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rx_fifo_rst
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, resets the Rx FIFO only. Auto-clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ip_main_rst
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, resets the whole IP including registers and FIFO. Auto-clear.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: TXSTART
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Transmit Start Register

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: tx_start
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, the IP starts processing the contents of Tx FIFO. This register auto-clears when when a command is done or a NAK is received unless it is bypassed by ignore_cmd_done or ignore_rcvd_nak register setting in controller configuration 0 register. To continue with the transfer, user will have to set this to 1 again.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: SC_STAT
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Secondary Controller Status Info Register. Applicable only when user enabled the Secondary Controller in IP Generation GUI.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: get_acccr_result
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: This status is the result of the GETACCCR command. This information is valid only if the interrupt status register get_acccr_done is asserted. Clear when interrupt status get_acccr_done is cleared. (0 - Successful controller handoff, 1 - ControllerHandoff failed)

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: get_acccr_started
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicates that the device has started/sent GETACCCR CCC. Clear when interrupt status get_acccr_done is cleared. 1 - Started GETACCCR CCC, 0 - No GETACCCR CCC

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: active_controller
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicates the current role of this device. The default value of this register takes the Device Role GUI parameter setting. If user selected Primary Controller, then the default value will be (1) Active Controller, otherwise it will be acting as a Target (0). The value of this register may change if there is a successful controller handoff or if user forced it by programming the Set Device Role register. 1 - Active Controller 0 - Target

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: SC_ROLE
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Set Device Role register. Applicable only when user enabled the Secondary Controller in IP Generation GUI.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: set_device_role
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: This status is the result of the GETACCCR command. This information is valid only if the interrupt status register get_acccr_done is asserted. Clear when interrupt status get_acccr_done is cleared. (0 - Successful controller handoff, 1 - ControllerHandoff failed)

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: SC_TIMER0
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Secondary Controller Timeout Register. Applicable only when user enabled the Secondary Controller in IP Generation GUI.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: crh_timeout0
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Controller role handoff timeout value. This is the number of system clock (clk_i) cycles. The default value is equivalent to 100us (40ns * 2500). This timeout value is used during controller handoff procedure when the former active controller confirms if the new active controller will assert its controller role.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: SC_TIMER1
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Secondary Controller Timeout Register. Applicable only when user enabled the Secondary Controller in IP Generation GUI.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: crh_timeout1
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Controller role handoff timeout value. This is the number of system clock (clk_i) cycles. The default value is equivalent to 100us (40ns * 2500). This timeout value is used during controller handoff procedure when the former active controller confirms if the new active controller will assert its controller role.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: SC_TIMER2
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Secondary Controller Timeout Register. Applicable only when user enabled the Secondary Controller in IP Generation GUI.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: crh_timeout2
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Controller role handoff timeout value. This is the number of system clock (clk_i) cycles. The default value is equivalent to 100us (40ns * 2500). This timeout value is used during controller handoff procedure when the former active controller confirms if the new active controller will assert its controller role.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: DA_ACKED
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Dynamic Address ACKed Counter.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: num_da_acked
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Running counter that indicates the number of dynamic address that was acknowledged during Enter DAA command. This counter will reset to 0 after writing all 1's.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: IBIRCNT
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: IBI Read Count Register. Applicable only when in-band interrupt capability is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_rcnt
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicates the number of bytes to read from target during IBI. This should be set depending on the target's setting. Set this register to 0 when responding to Hot Join or Secondary Controller interrupt.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: IBIRESP
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: IBI Response Register. Applicable only when in-band interrupt capability is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_resp
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: This will be the response of the I3C controller to the IBI or Hot Join request. Write to this register will trigger the IP to send the indicated response. 0 - ACK the IBI or Hot Join, 1 - NAK the IBI or Hot Join

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: IBIADDR
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: IBI Address Register. Applicable only when in-band interrupt capability is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_addr
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: This shows the address of the I3C Target or Secondary Controller that requested the IBI. If the interrupt is Hot Join, this will show the reserved target address 7'h02.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: INTSTAT0
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Status 0 Register. When high, it indicates an event and when the corresponding interrupt enable bit is enabled, it will cause the assertion of interrupt port (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rcvd_slv_nak
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it indicates that a NAK was received. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: command_done
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it indicates that a command has been sent (Private Write/Read or CCC). Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rcvd_sec_ibi
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set, it indicates that Secondary Controller interrupt is received. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rcvd_ibi
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set, it indicates that In-band interrupt is received. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rcvd_hot_join
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it indicates that Hot Join interrupt is received. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: tx_fifo_full
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it indicates that Tx FIFO is full. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rx_fifo_not_empty
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it indicates that Rx FIFO is not empty. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rd_cmd_done
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it indicates that a private read is done and all requested data specified by length are available in the Rx FIFO. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: INTSET0
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Set 0 Register. This is a dummy register that is used to test the assertion of interrupt status. When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rcvd_slv_nak_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: command_done_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rcvd_sec_ibi_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rcvd_ibi_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rcvd_hot_join_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: tx_fifo_full_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rx_fifo_not_empty_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rd_cmd_done_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: INTENA0
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Enable 0 Register. When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rcvd_slv_nak_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: command_done_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rcvd_sec_ibi_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rcvd_ibi_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rcvd_hot_join_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: tx_fifo_full_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rx_fifo_not_empty_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rd_cmd_done_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: INTSTAT1
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Status 1 Register. When high, it indicates an event and when the corresponding interrupt enable bit is enabled, it will cause the assertion of interrupt port (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rx_fifo_full
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it indicates that Rx FIFO is full. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: crh_timeout_expired
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only when user enabled the Secondary Controller in IP Generation GUI. When set to high, it indicates that the controller handoff has failed due to the new controller failing to assert its role within the specified timeout value in Secondary Controller Timeout register. This means that this device will remain as active controller. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: get_acccr_done
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only when user enabled the Secondary Controller in IP Generation GUI. When set to high, it indicates that GETACCCR CCC was done and the result of this command is available in the secondary controller status info register. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_rd_done
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it indicates IBI payload was received and IBI read transaction has been terminated. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: wr_early_term
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it indicates that I2C private write data was not completely transferred due to the target terminating it with NAK. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rd_early_term
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it indicates that a private read is done due to target terminating with T bit==0 and the read data received is less than what was requested. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: INTSET1
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Set 1 Register. This is a dummy register that is used to test the assertion of interrupt status. When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 1 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rx_fifo_full_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 1 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: crh_timeout_expired_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 1 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: get_acccr_done_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 1 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_rd_done_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 1 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: wr_early_term_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 1 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rd_early_term_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 1 signal.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: INTENA1
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Enable 1 Register.When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rx_fifo_full_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: crh_timeout_expired_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: get_acccr_done_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_rd_done_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: wr_early_term_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rd_early_term_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 0 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: BUSCOND
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Bus Condition Debug Register

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_ddr_mode
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When high, indicates that the bus is currently in HDR-DDR mode. Otherwise it is in SDR mode.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: i3c_line_idle
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When high, indicates that the bus state is in idle. This also implies that bus is free (SCL and SDA are both high).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: scl_oe
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Shows the current value of the SCL output enable. 1 - SCL output is driven, 0 - SCL output is not driven

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: scl_o
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Shows the current value of the SCL output generated by IP. 1 - SCL output is driven, 0 - SCL output is not driven

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: sda_wpu
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Shows the current value of the SDA weak pull up control signal. 1 - weak pull up resistor is disabled, 0 - weak pull up resistor is enabled

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: sda_spu
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Shows the current value of the SDA strong pull up control signal. 1 - strong pull up resistor is disabled, 0 - strong pull up resistor is enabled

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: sda_oe
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Shows the current value of the SDA output enable. 1 - SDA output is driven, 0 - SDA output is not driven

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: sda_o
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Shows the current value of the SDA output generated by IP.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LASTNAKADR
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Last NAKed Target Address

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: tgt_addr
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: This shows the latest target address driven by the I3C Controller that receives a NAK response.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: read1_write0
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicates the transaction type either read (1) or write (0).

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: LASTACKADR
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Last ACKed Target Address

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: tgt_addr
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: This shows the latest target address driven by the I3C Controller that receives an ACK response.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: read1_write0
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicates the transaction type either read (1) or write (0).

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: INTSTAT2
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Status 2 Register. When high, it indicates an event and when the corresponding interrupt enable bit is enabled, it will cause the assertion of interrupt port (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_rcvd_nak
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only if HDR-DDR capable. When set to high, it indicates that a NAK was received. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_command_done
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only if HDR-DDR capable. When set to high, it indicates that a command has been sent (HDR Write/Read or CCC). Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_par_error
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only if HDR-DDR capable. When set, it indicates that Parity error is detected. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_crc_error
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only if HDR-DDR capable. When set, it indicates that CRC error is detected. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_rd_early_term
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only if HDR-DDR capable. When set to high, it indicates that HDR read is done due to target terminating the transfer and the read data received is less than what was requested. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_wr_early_term
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only if HDR-DDR capable. When set to high, it indicates that HDR write data was not completely transferred due to the target terminating the transfer. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_rd_cmd_done
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only if HDR-DDR capable. When set to high, it indicates that HDR read command is done and all requested data specified by length are available in the Rx FIFO. Clear on write of 1.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: INTSET2
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Set 2 Register. This is a dummy register that is used to test the assertion of interrupt status. When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 2 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_rcvd_nak_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 2 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_command_done_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 2 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_par_error_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 2 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_crc_error_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 2 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_rd_early_term_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 2 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_wr_early_term_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 2 signal.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_rd_cmd_done_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it triggers the corresponding interrupt status 2 signal.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: INTENA2
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Enable 2 Register. When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 2 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_rcvd_nak_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 2 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_command_done_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 2 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_par_error_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 2 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_crc_error_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 2 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_rd_early_term_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 2 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_wr_early_term_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 2 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_rd_cmd_done_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, it enables the corresponding interrupt status 2 signal to cause the assertion of interrupt port signal (int_o).

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: TXFIFO
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Tx FIFO Access

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: tx_fifo_data
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: This is a dummy register that is used to fill data to Tx FIFO. User will use this to send the packet frames to Tx FIFO through repeated write access to this dummy register. Reading this register would return the status of Tx FIFO not_empty flag.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: RXFIFO
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Rx FIFO Access

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rx_fifo_data
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: This is a dummy register that is used to get the read data from Rx FIFO. The read data as a result of response from read request will be stored in Rx FIFO. User will use this to get the received data from Rx FIFO through repeated read access to this dummy register. User may want to check the interrupt status 0 register (bit[1]) first to determine if Rx FIFO is not empty.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: BCR
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Target Bus Characteristics Register

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: device_role
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 2'b00 - I3C Target, 2'b01 - I3C Controller-capable (Not implemented in this IP), Others - Reserved for future definition by MIPI Alliance I3C WG

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: advanced_caps
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 0 - Does not support optional advanced capabilities., 1 - Supports optional advanced capabilities. When Target is configured with IBI capability and IBI payload, this is set to 1 for optional Pending Read MDB support.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: virtual_tgt_support
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 0 - Is not a Virtual Target and does not expose other downstream Device(s), 1 - Is a Virtual Target, or exposes other downstream Device(s)

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: offline_capable
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 0 - Device will always respond to I3C Bus commands, 1 - Device will not always respond to I3C Bus Commands

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_payload
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: From IBI Payload Size attiribute. 0 - If IBI Payload Size attribute is set to 0. No data bytes follow the IBI., 1 - If IBI Payload Size attribute is set to greater than or equal to 1. One data byte (MDB) shall follow the accepted IBI, and additional data bytes may follow

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_capable
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: From IBI Capable attribute. 0 - Not capable., 1 - Capable.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: max_d_speed_limit
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: From Maximum Data Speed Limitation attribute. 0 - No limitation., 1 - With limitation. Controller shall use GETMXDS CCC to get specific limitation from Target.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: DCR
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Target Device Characteristics Register

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: dcr
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Device ID set by User through DCR attribute. 255 available codes for describing the type of sensor or Device (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope, composite Devices). Default value is 8'b0 for generic Device.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: DYN_ADDR
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Assigned dynamic address and done flag

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: daa_done
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 0 - DA is not yet assigned or is reset by RSTDAA CCC.,1 - DA is assigned via ENTDAA, SETNEWDA, SETAASA or SETDASA CCC

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: dyn_addr
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Dynamic Address Assigned to I3C Target

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: HJ_IBI_EN
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Hot-Join and IBI enable from Controller via ENEC/DISEC CCC

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hj_enec
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Hot-Join Enable by Controller. 0 - Target-initiated Hot-Join is not allowed on the I3C bus, 1 - Target-initiated Hot-Join is allowed on the I3C bus

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: cr_enec
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Controller Role Request Enable by Controller. 0 - Target-initiated Controller Role Request is not allowed on the I3C bus, 1 - Target-initiated Controller Role Request is allowed on the I3C bus

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_enec
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: IBI Enable by Controller. 0 - Target-initiated interrupts are not allowed on the I3C bus, 1 - Target-initiated interrupts are allowed on the I3C bus

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: HJ_IBI_CAP
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Hot-Join and IBI capability configured by User using attributes

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hj_cap
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 0 - Target device is configured without Hot-Join Capability, 1 - Target device is configured with Hot-Join Capability

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: cr_cap
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 0 - Target device is configured without Secondary-Controller Capability, 1 - Target device is configured with Secondary-Controller Capability

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_cap
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 0 - Target device is configured without IBI Capability, 1 - Target device is configured with IBI Capability

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: HJ_IBI_REQ
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Hot-Join and IBI request from User.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hj_req
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to High, Target will initiate Hot-Join request at the next valid opportunity. Reset to 0 when Hot-Join is done or disabled by the Controller.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: cr_req
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to High, Target will initiate Controller Role Request at the next valid opportunity. Reset to 0 when Controller Role Request is done or disabled by the Controller.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_req
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to High, Target will initiate IBI at the next valid opportunity. Reset to 0 when IBI is done or disabled by the Controller.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: HJ_IBI_RETRY
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Number of retries for Hot-Join and IBI.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hj_ibi_retry
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicates number of times the Target retries Hot-Join or IBI when it is NACKed by the Controller. When set to 0, number of tries is not limited.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: MWL_MSB
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Most significant byte of Maximum Write Length set by the Controller

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: mwl_msb
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Most Significant Byte of maximum write length set by I3C Controller via SETMWL CCC. If SETMWL is greater than default value 512 (FIFO size), MWL will be set to 512.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: MWL_LSB
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Least significant byte of Maximum Write Length set by the Controller

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: mwl_lsb
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Least Significant Byte of maximum write length set by I3C Controller via SETMWL CCC. If SETMWL is greater than default value 512 (FIFO size), MWL will be set to 512.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: MRL_MSB
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Most significant byte of Maximum Read Length set by the Controller

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: mrl_msb
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Most Significant Byte of maximum read length set by I3C Controller via SETMRL CCC. If SETMRL is greater than default value 512 (FIFO size), MRL will be set to 512.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: MRL_LSB
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Least significant byte of Maximum Read Length set by the Controller

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: mrl_lsb
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Least Significant Byte of maximum read length set by I3C Controller via SETMRL CCC. If SETMRL is greater than default value 512 (FIFO size), MRL will be set to 512.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: MAX_IBI_PAYLD
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Maximum IBI Payload Size set by the Controller. Applicable only when Target is configured with IBI capability and IBI payload is set to greater than or equal to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: max_ibi_payld
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Maximum IBI Payload set by I3C Controller via SETMRL CCC. If value is greater than FIFO size, register will be set to FIFO size. Unlimited payload size is not supported in this IP.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: MXDS2_W
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Applicable only when Target is configured with Maximum Data Speed Limitation

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: mxds2_w_defbyte
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 0 - Target does not support defining byte for GETMXDS CCC., 1 - Target supports defining byte for GETMXDS CCC.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: mxds2_w_rate
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Maximum Sustained Data Rate for non-CCC Messages sent by Controller Device to Target Device. 0 - fSCL Max (default value), 1 - 8 MHz, 2 - 6 MHz, 3 - 4 MHz, 4 - 2 MHz, Others - Reserved for future use by MIPI Alliance

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: MXDS2_R
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Applicable only when Target is configured with Maximum Data Speed Limitation

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: mxds2_r_wr2rd_stop
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: If maximum read turnaround time is not 0, then this field is used to tell the Controller whether the Target permits the Write-to-Read to be split by a STOP. 0 - STOP would cancel the Read, 1 - The Target permits the Write-to-Read to be split by a STOP (not supported in this IP)

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: mxds2_r_tsco
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Clock to Data Turnaround Time (tSCO). 0 - less than or equal to 8 ns (default value), 1 - less than or equal to 9 ns, 2 - less than or equal to 10 ns, 3 - less than or equal to 11 ns, 4 - less than or equal to 12 ns, 5, 6 - Reserved for future use by MIPI Alliance, 7 - tSCO is > 12 ns, and is reported by private agreement

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: mxds2_r_rate
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Maximum Sustained Data Rate for non-CCC Messages sent by Target Device to Controller Device. 0 - fSCL Max (default value), 1 - 8 MHz, 2 - 6 MHz, 3 - 4 MHz, 4 - 2 MHz, Others - Reserved for future use by MIPI Alliance

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: MAX_RDTURN_B2
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Applicable only when Target is configured with Maximum Data Speed Limitation

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: max_rdturn_b2
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Maximum Read Turnaround Time in us. Most significant byte of 24-bit field that can encode turnaround times from 0.0 seconds to 16 seconds.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: MAX_RDTURN_B1
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Applicable only when Target is configured with Maximum Data Speed Limitation

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: max_rdturn_b1
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Maximum Read Turnaround Time in us. Middle byte of 24-bit field that can encode turnaround times from 0.0 seconds to 16 seconds.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: MAX_RDTURN_B0
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Applicable only when Target is configured with Maximum Data Speed Limitation

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: max_rdturn_b0
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Maximum Read Turnaround Time in us. Least significant byte of 24-bit field that can encode turnaround times from 0.0 seconds to 16 seconds.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: PID_BYTE6
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: 6th Byte of Target Device PID.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: pid_manuf1
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Bits 14:7 of 15-bit MIPI Manufacturer ID. Reset value may be configured by User via Manufacturer ID attribute.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: PID_BYTE5
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: 5th Byte of Target Device PID.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: pid_manuf0
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Bits 6:0 of 15-bit MIPI Manufacturer ID. Reset value may be configured by User via Manufacturer ID attribute.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: pid_type_sel
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Provisioned ID type selector. 0 - Vendor Fixed Value, 1 - Random value generated by device (Not supported in this IP)

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: PID_BYTE4
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: 4th Byte of Target Device PID.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: pid_part1
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Bits 15:8 of 16-bit Part ID when pid_type_sel is 0. The meaning of this 16-bit field is left to the Device vendor to define. Reset value may be configured by User via Part ID attribute.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: PID_BYTE3
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: 3rd Byte of Target Device PID.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: pid_part0
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Bits 7:0 of 16-bit Part ID when pid_type_sel is 0. The meaning of this 16-bit field is left to the Device vendor to define. Reset value may be configured by User via Part ID attribute.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: PID_BYTE2
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: 2nd Byte of Target Device PID.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: pid_inst
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Instance ID field that should identify the individual Device, using a method selected by the system designer (e.g., straps, fuses, non-volatile memory, or another appropriate method). Reset value may be configured by User via Instance ID attribute.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: pid_add1
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Bits 11:8 of 12-bit Additional ID for definitions with additional meaning (e.g., Deeper device characteristics that may optionally include Device Characteristics Register values). Reset value may be configured by User via Additional ID attribute.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: PID_BYTE1
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: 1st Byte of Target Device PID.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: pid_add0
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Bits 7:0 of 12-bit Additional ID for definitions with additional meaning (e.g., Deeper device characteristics that may optionally include Device Characteristics Register values). Reset value may be configured by User via Additional ID attribute.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: STAT_ADDR
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: 1st Byte of Target Device PID.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: stat_addr
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Target Static Address assigned by User. Reset value may be configured by User via Static Address attribute. If static address is disabled, reset value is 0.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: GETCAPS_B1
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Device capabilities that Target returns when Controller sends GETCAPS CCC.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_bt_mode
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Fixed to 0. HDR-BT mode is not supported.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_tsl_mode
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Fixed to 0. HDR-BT mode is not supported.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_tsp_mode
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Fixed to 0. HDR-BT mode is not supported.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_ddr_mode
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Set to 1 when device is configured with HDR capability. Only HDR-DDR mode is supported.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: GETCAPS_B2
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Device capabilities that Target returns when Controller sends GETCAPS CCC.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_ddr_abort_crc
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: I3C Target capability of emitting the CRC Word when a transaction in HDR-DDR Mode is aborted. Set to 1 when device is configured with HDR capability. 0 - No, 1 - Yes

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_ddr_wr_abort
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: I3C Target capability of issuing the Write Abort in HDR-DDR Mode. Set to 1 when device is configured with HDR capability. 0 - No, 1 - Yes

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: grp_adr_caps
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicates the Group Address function capabilities of this I3C Device. Fixed to 0. IP does not support Group Address function.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: i3c_spec_ver
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicates the minor version number of the MIPI I3C Specification with which this I3C v1.x Device complies (i.e., the 'x' in I3C v1.x). Setting to 0x is illegal.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: GETCAPS_B3
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Device capabilities that Target returns when Controller sends GETCAPS CCC.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: pend_rd_mdb
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: I3C Target support for IBI with Pending Read Notification MDB, which the Controller shall then follow with a Private Read request to fetch the data. Set to 1 when device is configured with IBI with MDB capability. 0 - No, 1 - Yes

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_bt_crc32
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: I3C Target support CRC-32 data integrity verification in HDR Bulk Transport Mode. 0 - No, 1 - Yes (Not supported in this IP)

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: getstatus_defbyte
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: I3C Target support for defining byte in GETSTATUS CCC. 0 - No, 1 - Yes (Not supported in this IP)

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: getcaps_defbyte
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: I3C Target support for defining byte in GETCAPS CCC. 0 - No, 1 - Yes (Not supported in this IP)

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: d2dxfer_ibi
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: I3C Target capability to initiate Device to Device (D2D) Transfer using IBI with MDB 0x37. 0 - No, 1 - Yes (Not supported in this IP)

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: d2dxfer
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: I3C Target support for D2D transfers either as a Source or a Subscriber/Receiver. 0 - No, 1 - Yes (Not supported in this IP)

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ml_data_xfer
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: I3C Target support for Multi-Lane data transfer. 0 - No, 1 - Yes (Not supported in this IP)

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: OSC_INACCURACY
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Inaccuracy of Target's internal oscillator.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: osc_inaccuracy
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Describes the maximum variation of the Target's internal oscillator in 1/10th percent (0.1%) increments, up to 25.5%.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: RX_FIFO
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Receive FIFO

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rx_fifo
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Data bytes received from I3C bus are stored in this FIFO. User can get the received data by reading from this address multiple times depending on the number of data bytes to be read. User may read rxfifo_not_empty interrupt status register (Interrupt Status 2 Bit 6) first to determine if there is data to be read from rx_fifo.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: TX_FIFO
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Transmit FIFO

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: tx_fifo
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Data to be sent to I3C bus are stored in this FIFO. User can do multiple writes to this address depending on the number of data bytes to be written. Reading from this address will indicate txfifo_empty status (0x1 - Empty, 0x - Not Empty).

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: SOFT_RESET
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Soft Reset

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ip_csr_rst
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, resets the IP read-write and write-only registers only. Auto-clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ip_core_rst
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, resets the internal state of I3C Target Core only (including Tx and Rx FIFO). Dynamic address and configurations via CCCs are not reset.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: tx_fifo_rst
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, resets the Tx FIFO only. Auto-clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rx_fifo_rst
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, resets the Rx FIFO only. Auto-clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ip_main_rst
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to high, resets the whole IP including registers, FIFO, dynamic address, and CCC configurations. Auto-clear.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: TGT_ACKNAK
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Target Response

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: fifo_loopback_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 0 - Data written through Private Write will be read from Rx FIFO. Data written to Tx FIFO will be read through Private Read. 1 - Data written through Private Write will be stored in Rx FIFO and transferred to Tx FIFO to be read through Private Read. Data written to the Tx FIFO by the User can still be read through Private Read.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: txfifo_empty_rd_nak
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Target response when Controller reads but Tx FIFO is empty 0 - In SDR mode, Target will ACK its Address and return 0xFF read data then End-of-Message by pulling SDA Low at T-bit. If I3C bus is in HDR mode and Target is configured with HDR capability, Target will ACK its address and return 0x data then end Read. 1 - Target will NACK its Address

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: GET_STATUS_MSB
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Most significant byte that the Target returns when Controller sends GETSTATUS CCC

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: get_status_msb
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Reserved for vendor-specific meaning.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: GET_STATUS_LSB
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Least significant byte that the Target returns when Controller sends GETSTATUS CCC

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: activity_mode
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Contains the 2-bit ID of the Target Device's current activity mode. For Target devices without secondary controller capability, the meanings of this value will depend upon a private contract between the Target and the Controller.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: pending_interrupt
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Contains the interrupt number of any pending interrupt, or 0 if no interrupts are pending.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: BUS_ACT_STATE
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Least significant byte that the Target returns when Controller sends GETSTATUS CCC

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: bus_act
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When bus_act_rcvd is set to 1, this register indicates the activity state received. Write 1 to clear. 0 - 1 us (Latency-free,operation), 1 - 100 us, 2 - 2ms, 3 - 50ms (Lowest-activity operation)

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: TGT_RST_ACT0
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Target Reset Action Information 1

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rst_act
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Target Reset Action configured by the Controller via Defining Byte of RSTACT CCC. When Target Reset Pattern is received after RSTACT CCC, User shall perform the configured reset action.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: TGT_RST_ACT1
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Target Reset Action Information 2

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rst_act_set0_get1
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 0 - Controller configured Target Reset Action by Direct SET RSTACT CCC, 1 - Controller configured Target Reset Action by Direct GET RSTACT CCC

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rst_act_broad0_dir1
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 0 - Controller configured Target Reset Action by Broadcast RSTACT CCC, 1 - Controller configured Target Reset Action by Direct Set/Get RSTACT CCC

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: TGT_RST_ACT2
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Target Reset Action Information 3

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rst_act_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Target Reset Action configured by the Controller via Defining Byte of Direct SET RSTACT CCC. This is the value returned by Target when Controller sends Direct GET CCC.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: STAT1_INT
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Status 1

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hj_req_gen
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Hot-Join request is generated by Target. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hj_done
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Hot-Join address with Write bit is transmitted by Target and Controller has either ACKed or NACKed for HJ_IBI_RETRY times. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hj_acknack
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Hot-Join is NACKed by Controller after HJ_IBI_RETRY times. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_req_gen
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, IBI request is generated by Target. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_done
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Target Address with Read bit has been transmitted by Target and Controller has either ACKED or NACKed the request for HJ_IBI_RETRY times. If with payload, IBI payload has been transmitted and finished either by End-of-Data (from Target) or STOP (from Controller). Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_acknack
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, IBI is NACKed by Controller after HJ_IBI_RETRY times. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_payld_terminated
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Controller aborted reading complete IBI payload. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: STAT1_INT_EN
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Status Enable 1

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hj_req_gen_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 1 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hj_done_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 1 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hj_acknack_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 1 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_req_gen_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 1 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_done_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 1 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_acknack_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 1 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_payld_terminated_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 1 is enabled.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: STAT1_INT_SET
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Status Set 1

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hj_req_gen_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 1 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hj_done_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 1 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hj_acknack_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 1 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_req_gen_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 1 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_done_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 1 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_acknack_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 1 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_payld_terminated_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 1 to 1.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: STAT2_INT
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Status 2

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: txfifo_full
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, it indicates Tx FIFO is full. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rxfifo_not_empty
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, it indicates that Rx FIFO is not empty. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: txfifo_full
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, it indicates Rx FIFO is full. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: read_txfifo_empty
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Controller initiated Read but Tx FIFO is empty. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: read_aborted
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Read is aborted early by Controller. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: da_par_err
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, parity bit error in dynamic address assignment occurred. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: tbit_err
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, data T-bit Error occurred. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: STAT2_INT_EN
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Status Enable 2

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: txfifo_full_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 2 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rxfifo_not_empty_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 2 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rxfifo_full_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 2 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: read_txfifo_empty_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 2 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: read_aborted_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 2 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: da_par_err_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 2 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: tbit_err_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 2 is enabled.

ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Status Set 2

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: txfifo_full_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 2 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rxfifo_not_empty_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 2 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rxfifo_full_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 2 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: read_txfifo_empty_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 2 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: read_aborted_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 2 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: da_par_err_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 2 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: tbit_err_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 2 to 1.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: STAT3_INT
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Status 3

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: enec_rcvd
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Target received Broadcast/Direct ENEC/DISEC CCC from Controller. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: tgt_rst_ptrn_rcvd
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Target received Target Reset Pattern from Controller. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rstact_ccc_rcvd
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Target received RSTACT CCC from Controller. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: bus_act_rcvd
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Target received ENTASx CCC from Controller Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: setxtime_rcvd
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Target received SETXTIME with supported sub-command byte from Controller. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: bus_aval
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, I3C bus is in Bus Available condition. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: bus_idle
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, I3C bus is in Bus Idle condition. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: STAT3_INT_EN
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Status Enable 3

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: enec_rcvd_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 3 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: tgt_rst_ptrn_rcvd_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 3 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rstact_ccc_rcvd_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 3 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: bus_act_rcvd_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 3 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: setxtime_rcvd_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 3 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: bus_aval_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 3 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: bus_idle_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 3 is enabled.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: STAT3_INT_SET
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Status Set 3

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: enec_rcvd_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 3 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: tgt_rst_ptrn_rcvd_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 3 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rstact_ccc_rcvd_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 3 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: bus_act_rcvd_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 3 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: setxtime_rcvd_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 3 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: bus_aval_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 3 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: bus_idle_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 3 to 1.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: STAT4_INT
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Status 4

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: get_acccr_rcvd
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Target received GET_ACCCR CCC from Controller. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: get_acccr_acknak
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Target NACKed GET_ACCCR CCC received from Controller. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: deftgts_rcvd
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Target received DEFTGTS CCC from Controller (including data bytes describing each device in the bus). Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: cr_req_gen
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Controller Role request is generated by Target . Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: cr_req_done
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Target Address with Write bit has been transmitted by Target and Controller has either ACKed or NACKed the request for HJ_IBI_RETRY times. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: cr_req_acknack
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, Controller Role request is NACKed by Controller after HJ_IBI_RETRY times. Write 1 to clear.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: STAT4_INT_EN
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Status Enable 4

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: get_acccr_rcvd_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 4 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: get_acccr_acknak_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 4 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: deftgts_rcvd_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 4 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: cr_req_gen_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 4 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: cr_req_done_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 4 is enabled.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: cr_req_acknack_en
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When set to 1, corresponding interrupt status 4 is enabled.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: STAT4_INT_SET
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Interrupt Status Set 4

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: get_acccr_rcvd_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 4 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: get_acccr_acknak_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 4 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: deftgts_rcvd_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 4 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: cr_req_gen_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 4 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: cr_req_done_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 4 to 1.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: cr_req_acknack_set
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Manually set corresponding interrupt status 4 to 1.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: DEFTGTS_COUNT
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Count information sent by the Active Controller via DEFTGTS CCC

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: deftgts_count
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Describes the number of Targets and Groups present in the I3C bus.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: DEFTGTS_RXFIFO_S
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Pointer for start address of DEFTGTS data in Rx FIFO.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rxfifo_deftgts_start
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Count N indicates number of times User needs to read from Rx FIFO before DEFTGTS data is read. When equal to 0, next read data is start of DEFTGTS data.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: DEFTGTS_RXFIFO_C
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Number of DEFTGTS data bytes stored in Rx FIFO.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: rxfifo_deftgts_count
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicates number of DEFTGTS data bytes stored in Rx FIFO. When reading of DEFTGTS data is started (rxfifo_deftgts_start is equal to 8'h0), this count decreases by one every Rx FIFO read. When 0 count is reached, all DEFTGTS data has been read from Rx FIFO.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: CTL_HANDOFF
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Target configuration for Controller Role Handoff

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: get_acccr_auto_resp
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Target auto-response when receiving GETACCCR CCC. Default response is NACK. 0 - Target will ACK the GETACCCR CCC, 1 - Target will NACK the GETACCCR CCC

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: device_role
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Current device role. User may write to this register to reset the device role (may be used when the system loses information on the device role). 0 - Device is acting as Target, 1 - Device is acting as Controller

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: GETMXDS_CRHDLY
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Return value for GETMXDS when defining byte is 0x91.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: crh_set_act_state
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicates whether the Active Controller should set the Bus to a certain Activity State before passing the Controller Role to this device. 0 - Active Controller should not set the bus to any Activity State before passing the Controller Role to this Device, 1 - Active Controller should set the bus to the Activity State set in bits 1:0 before passing the Controller Role to this Device

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: crh_act_state
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When crh_set_act_state is set to 1, this indicates whether the device initially acts with a given Activity State after becoming the Active Controller on the Bus. The indicated Activity State implies that the Device may have a delayed response to Bus activity, and so the former Controller should wait the specified delay time for the indicated Activity State before testing this Device, to confirm that it is controlling the Bus before initiating the CE3 error recovery flow.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: GETSTATUS_PRECR
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Return value for GETSTATUS when defining byte is 0x91.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: handoff_delay_nack
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicates whether this Device is currently processing any DEFTGTS CCC Broadcasts that may have been sent by the Active Controller. 0 - The Device is not currently processing Broadcast data and can safely accept the Controller Role. 1 - The Device is currently processing DEFTGTS and may be updating its internal state. Active Controller may wait to send GETACCCR CCC to this Device or should at least be aware that any attempts to send GETACCCR CCC to this Device will be met with a NACK response until this bit is read again later with a value of 1'b0.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: deep_sleep_det
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicates whether the device has entered a deep sleep state in which it may have missed any DEFTGTS CCC sent by the Active controller. Consequently, this device's internal state of known Target devices should be considered outdated. 0 - The device has not entered a deep sleep state., 1 - The device has entered a deep sleep state. The Active Controller shall send another DEFTGTS CCC to update the device's internal state before sending GETACCCR CCC.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: GETCAPS_CRCAP1
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Return value for GETCAPS when defining byte is 0x91.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: multi_lane_support
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicates that device may use the MLANE CCC to change ML configuration of other I3C Targets. Not supported in this IP.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: grp_mgmt_support
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicatest that device supports Group Address handoff or management capabilities. (Not supported in this IP).

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hot_join_support
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicates that The device may support Hot-Join and will ACK an I3C Target Hot-Join request while it is the Active Controller on the Bus. Fixed to 1.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: GETCAPS_CRCAP2
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: Return value for GETCAPS when defining byte is 0x91.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: dly_ctrl_handoff
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 0 - The device does not need additional time to process Broadcast CCC data from the Active Controller. The Active Controller may expect it to ACK the GETACCCR CCC as part of the Controller Role Handoff procedure even if the device did not initially send a Controller Role Request. 1 - The device may need additional time processing data from the Controller. The Active Controller shall periodically check the value returned by GETSTATUS with 0x91 to determine if the device is ready to accept the Controller Role.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: deep_sleep_capable
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 0 - The device shall remain active and continue to monitor the I3C bus to listen for Broadcast CCCs sent by the Active Controller and shall not enter a deep sleep state from which it must be resynchronized by the Active Controller before it can accept the Controller role. 1 - The device may enter a deep sleep state during which it may miss some Broadcast DEFTGTS sent by the Active Controller. This will require resynchronization upon re-entering a normal operating state before it can accept the Controller Role.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ctrl_pass_back
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: 0 - The device shall not automatically pass the Controller Role back to the former Active Controller and shall support a Controller Role request from any Controller-capable device., 1 - The device shall automatically pass the Controller Role back to the former Active Controller from which it received its Controller Role. This is done via GETACCCR CCC once it has finished performing any tasks that require it to request and gain the Controller Role. This device shall support a Controller Role request from any Controller-capable device.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: ibi_support
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Indicates that device may support IBI and will ACK an I3C Target IBI while it is the Active Controller on the Bus. Fixed to 1.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: BUS_MODE
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: I3C Bus Mode

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: bus_hdr_mode
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: When equal to High, I3C Bus is in HDR mode.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: HDR_DDR_CONFIG
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: HDR-DDR Target Configuration for received HDR data

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_ddr_wr_cmd_to_fifo
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only when Target is configured with HDR capability. When set to High, HDR-DDR Write Command is stored to Rx FIFO.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_ddr_rd_cmd_to_fifo
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only when Target is configured with HDR capability. When set to High, HDR-DDR Read Command is stored to Rx FIFO.

ipxact:register.ipxact:name: HDR_DDR_ABORT
ipxact:register.ipxact:description: HDR-DDR Abort Configuration set by Controller via ENDXFER CCC

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_ddr_abort_crc
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only when Target is configured with HDR capability. When set to High, Target is capable of emitting the CRC Word when a transaction in HDR-DDR Mode is aborted.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_ddr_write_abort
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only when Target is configured with HDR capability. When set to High, Target is capable of issuing the Write Abort in HDR-DDR Mode. This IP will issue Write Abort in HDR-DDR Mode if the Rx FIFO is full.

ipxact:field.ipxact:name: hdr_ddr_write_nack
ipxact:field.ipxact:description: Applicable only when Target is configured with HDR capability. When set to High, Target is capable of issuing a NACK to an HDR-DDR Write Command. This IP will issue NACK an HDR-DDR Write Command if the Rx FIFO is full.
